title: Verify 'Sign Up' button functionality
expected_result: The app should navigate to the sign-up form.

title: Verify 'Sign In' button functionality
expected_result: The app should navigate to the sign-in form.

title: Verify 'Sign Up' button with empty fields
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign Up' button. | Do not enter any information in the sign-up form.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating required fields are missing.

title: Verify 'Sign In' button with invalid credentials
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign In' button. | Enter invalid email and password in the sign-in form.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating invalid credentials.

title: Verify 'Sign Up' button with valid credentials
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign Up' button. | Enter valid email and password in the sign-up form.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the sign-up form with the entered credentials.

title: Verify 'Sign In' button with valid credentials
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign In' button. | Enter valid email and password in the sign-in form.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the sign-in form with the entered credentials.

title: Verify 'Sign Up' button with invalid email format
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign Up' button. | Enter an invalid email format in the sign-up form.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating the email format is invalid.

title: Verify 'Sign In' button with invalid email format
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign In' button. | Enter an invalid email format in the sign-in form.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating the email format is invalid.

title: Verify 'Sign Up' button with invalid password format
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign Up' button. | Enter an invalid password format in the sign-up form.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating the password format is invalid.

title: Verify 'Sign In' button with invalid password format
test_steps: Click on the 'Sign In' button. | Enter an invalid password format in the sign-in form.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating the password format is invalid.
